creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
The Australian FTP sites listed in files/freebsd.ftp.markers were out of date.
I have listed ftp.au -> ftp7.au and provided coordinates for them all. I used
the already present coordinates for UQ/AARNet (ftp.au) and USyd (ftp3.au) and
got the rest by searching for the closest entry I could think of at
http://www.auslig.gov.au/. They should be close enough considering the scale.
